summary: Iteration 15 testing complete. All 7 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - School dashboard Benvenuto card with all 4 categories, Welcome page redesign with hero/features/audience sections, Inbox page Gmail panel with proper 'not configured' status, Training courses payments tab with CSV export button.
critical_code_review_comments: School dashboard Benvenuto card correctly mentions all 4 categories: Interessati, Studenti, Alumni, Trainer Ariadne
Onboarding dialog LEVELS constant includes all 4 options: interessato, studente, alumni, trainer
Action buttons (Entra nella community, Coltiva il percorso, Resta aggiornato/a) have green hover styling with hover:bg-[hsl(82,60%,42%)]
Welcome page has hero section with hero image, 'Cosa puoi fare qui' with 4 feature cards, 'A chi si rivolge' with all 4 audience categories
Welcome page includes school story section, trainers section, bibliography, CTA with Calendly link
Gmail panel shows correct status: 'Gmail non collegato' with 'Credenziali mancanti' badge when GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET empty
Gmail API endpoints work correctly: /api/inbox/gmail-status returns configured:false, /api/inbox/gmail/connect returns 400
Training courses payments tab has 'Esporta CSV' button with data-testid='payment-export-csv-btn'
Community dashboard API returns events with course_id and user_interest fields
All UI text is in Italian throughout the application
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 features verified: (1) School dashboard Benvenuto card has all 4 categories (Interessati/Studenti/Alumni/Trainer Ariadne), (2) Onboarding has 4 level options, (3) Action buttons have green hover effect, (4) Welcome page fully redesigned with hero/features/audience/trainers/bibliography/CTA, (5) Inbox page Gmail panel shows correct unconfigured status, (6) Gmail API returns configured:false and 400 on connect when no Google credentials, (7) Payment tab has CSV export button, (8) Community dashboard events have course_id and user_interest fields.

features_verified.school_dashboard_benvenuto_4_categories: PASS - Interessati, Studenti, Alumni, Trainer Ariadne all mentioned in welcome card text

features_verified.welcome_page_cosa_puoi_fare: PASS - 'Cosa puoi fare qui' section with 4 feature cards
features_verified.welcome_page_a_chi_si_rivolge: PASS - 'A chi si rivolge' section with all 4 audience categories
features_verified.welcome_page_school_story: PASS - 'La scuola Ariadne' section with description and approach
features_verified.welcome_page_trainers: PASS - Trainers section with 5 trainer cards
features_verified.welcome_page_bibliography: PASS - Bibliography section with 5 reference books
features_verified.welcome_page_cta_calendly: PASS - CTA section with 'Prenota una chiamata' button
features_verified.inbox_gmail_panel: PASS - Gmail panel shows 'Gmail non collegato' status
features_verified.inbox_gmail_panel_unconfigured_badge: PASS - Shows 'Credenziali mancanti' badge when no Google credentials
features_verified.api_gmail_status_configured_false: PASS - Returns {connected: false, configured: false} when GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID empty
features_verified.api_gmail_connect_400: PASS - Returns 400 'Credenziali Google non configurate' when credentials empty
features_verified.payment_csv_export_button: PASS - 'Esporta CSV' button visible in Scadenze pagamenti tab

features_verified.community_events_user_interest: PASS - API returns user_interest field in upcoming_events
features_verified.all_ui_italian: PASS - All UI text verified to be in Italian

gmail_integration_note: Gmail integration requires GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET environment variables. Currently empty in backend/.env, so endpoints correctly return 'not configured' status. When credentials are added, OAuth flow will work.
